overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a futuristic Asian-inspired cyberpunk city district. The character crosses a sunlit intersection and approaches a sidewalk food vendor area with neon signage and street food stalls.

events.description: character steps from crosswalk onto sidewalk entering commercial vendor area

agents.ego_description: player character with red hair walks across the intersection toward the sidewalk vendors on the right

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with neon advertisements
string of red spherical lanterns hanging across the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
multi-story teal-colored building with storefronts on ground level
large illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit cyberpunk intersection with towering glass skyscrapers in the background. Red paper lanterns hang above the crosswalk as the character walks across the street toward a green commercial building. The camera follows from behind as the character transitions from the open road onto the sidewalk.

events.description: steam or smoke rises from food preparation area creating atmospheric effect

agents.ego_description: character walks along the sidewalk past various street food stalls and vending machines

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall preparing items

stoves and grills for street food preparation

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk under building overhangs, the character passes outdoor food counters and a vending machine. Steam rises from cooking equipment as the camera moves past trash bins and food stalls. The green building recedes into the background while the character continues along the vendor-lined walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food service counter with customer seating

events.description: character slows down and approaches the food counter where a customer is seated

agents.ego_description: character approaches the food vendor counter where a customer is seated eating

notable_agents.action: customer in plaid shirt sitting at counter eating food
vendor working behind the counter preparing food

entered.detail: stainless steel counter with food preparation area and seating
flat top grill and cooking surface with steam rising
large metal exhaust hood with fluorescent lighting
illuminated sign with tiger graphic on building wall
bright green plastic stools at the counter

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a specific food service counter where a customer in a plaid shirt sits on green stools eating. Overhead ventilation hoods and fluorescent lights dominate the narrow space. A neon tiger sign glows on the wall as the camera moves closer to the cooking grill and counter area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open city intersection into the dense, neon-lit atmosphere of a street food alley. It begins at a sunlit crosswalk beneath red paper lanterns, following the character from behind as they leave the towering glass skyscrapers and move toward a green commercial building. As the character transitions from the road onto the concrete sidewalk, the open light fades under building overhangs where steam rises from outdoor food counters and vending machines. The scene then narrows into a crowded vendor-lined walkway, passing trash bins and stalls before shifting toward a specific service counter. Finally, the camera closes in on a customer seated on green stools beneath fluorescent lights and ventilation hoods, coming to rest near a cooking grill and a glowing neon tiger sign.
